_documentation: Strongest VIBMask configuration on digits-MNIST (V14-A recipe). Combines: (1) variance log-prior on selector logits to bypass H-bias on always-zero border pixels, (2) auxiliary deterministic-soft-mask prediction loss to give the selector predictor-gradient on every gate, (3) multi-sparsity training loss summed over several top-k extractions, (4) γ-annealing from dense (5.0) to sparse (1.0), (5) feature-weight offset for uniform L0-style penalty, (6) 7×7 patch dilation at training and inference, (7) Lasso-rerank at inference top-k. Designed to match or exceed the paper's Fig.3 numbers at every k ≥ 10 picks.
